rewritten_title: Plan design system migration (200+ pages, 3-month transition)
rewritten_description:
This is a large-scale migration. Recommended approach:

Phase 1: Inventory all 200+ pages and map old→new component usage
Phase 2: Update pages in priority order with backward compatibility
Phase 3: Write migration guides and train the team
Phase 4: Set up deprecation warnings and update documentation

Constraints: 3-month transition period, old design system sunsets end of year, new components in design-system package, coordinate with design team on gaps. Definition of done for Phase 1: complete inventory with migration effort estimates per page.
what_good_rewriting_looks_like: Recognizes this is a multi-phase project. Structures into phases. Preserves all constraints (200+ pages, 3 months, end-of-year sunset, design-system package, design team coordination). Does NOT invent technical migration details.
acceptable_variation: May use different phase groupings. All constraints must be preserved.
